title: Crispy Australian Rolled Oats Stir-fry
description: A savory and crispy weeknight dish featuring rolled oats, sugar-free-friendly for those with dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Pork or Chicken meat, thinly sliced (for protein source)
Water or Coconut Milk for steaming and binding (optional)
Sugar-free Honey or Stevia for sweetening (if desired)

instructions: Combine the rolled oats and water in a pot, bringing to a boil then reducing heat and simmering until thickened, about 10 minutes.
In a pan with oil, sauté diced onion and minced garlic until translucent, adding sliced meat if using.
Add the steamed oats mixture into the pan, mixing well to incorporate all ingredients. Add soy sauce, sugar-free sweetener (if using), and any additional liquid for binding.
Simmer gently, ensuring the dish is heated through and reaches your desired consistency. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with additional vegetables or on its own as a savory side.
